rationale: Fix two hard-coded file paths: (1) CIFAR-10 ID test imglist from 'test.txt' to 'test_cifar10.txt', (2) CIFAR-100 OOD imglist from 'cifar100/test.txt' to 'cifar10/test_cifar100.txt', and TinyImageNet OOD imglist from 'tin/test.txt' to 'cifar10/test_tin.txt'. The benchmark imglist files for CIFAR-10 are all located under data/benchmark_imglist/cifar10/ with names like test_cifar10.txt, test_cifar100.txt, test_tin.txt.
